message:
perf(storage): batch blocked-cache incremental deletes (beads_rust-ils3)

Replace row-by-row DELETE loop in incremental_blocked_cache_update with
a single batched DELETE ... WHERE issue_id IN (?, ?, ...) per chunk.

Before: collected HashSet into Vec, chunked at 400, then issued one
DELETE per ID inside the inner loop — O(n) statements for n affected.

After: one DELETE with parameterized IN-clause per chunk — O(n/400)
statements. Matches the existing batched IN-clause pattern used
elsewhere in the file (e.g., load_direct_blockers_for_ids_impl).

The old row-by-row approach was guarded by a comment about "fsqlite
IN-clause bugs" but IN-clauses are used extensively throughout the
same file without issues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
